description.en:
Green Horizon Industries introduces Industrial Hemp to Farming Simulator 25.
Phase 2.7 test build: active in-game greenhouse/store placement is paused while the original Blender greenhouse model is rebuilt and approved. The mod icon remains packaged, but the greenhouse store item will be re-enabled after the real Green Horizon .i3d export and XML are ready.

text.name: function_ghi_hempGreenhouse
text.en: Grows industrial hemp from water and hemp seed.
